arts.ttl: AC Milan submit deadline day offer for Chelsea forward
arts.sum: AC Milan have submitted a formal proposal to sign Joao Felix on loan from Chelsea. Felix is exploring his options after struggling for a regular role since re-joining Chelsea in the summer. The Portugal international signed from Atletico Madrid in a £45m deal but has started just three times in the Premier League. 🔴⚫️ Joao […] The post AC Milan submit deadline day offer for Chelsea forward first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Caleb Wiley completes loan switch to Championship promotion contender
arts.sum: Chelsea allow one of the young prospects to complete a loan switch to a Championship promotion contender on transfer deadline day.

arts.ttl: West Ham sign Evan Ferguson on loan - no option to buy Brighton striker included in deal
arts.sum: West Ham confirmed the signing of Evan Ferguson on Monday, as the Brighton striker made the move to London on a loan deal for the remainder of the season. According to Sky Sports, the...

arts.ttl: “Not ruled out” | ExWHUEmployee | Daniel Cummings to West Ham update
arts.sum: West Ham haven’t ruled out trying to secure a deal for Daniel Cummings today, despite a rejection from Celtic again. Although West Ham have a pre-contract in place for the striker this summer, the club were eager to secure the move sooner by offering additional funds to enable the move from Celtic during this transfer... The post “Not ruled out” | ExWHUEmployee | Daniel Cummings to West Ham update appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: FC Porto make contact to sign West Ham player in deadline day deal
arts.sum: FC Porto have made contact with West Ham United regarding a deal for Luís Guilherme, with the Brazilian seriously struggling for minutes with the Hammers. The 18-year-old has had just 50 minutes of senior action this season and his camp will probably believe he needs more than that to aid his development. O Jogo report The post FC Porto make contact to sign West Ham player in deadline day deal appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea miss out on 'exceptional' striker as Brighton secure £22m deal
Brighton striker Ferguson joins West Ham on loan
arts.sum: Brighton and Republic of Ireland striker Evan Ferguson joins West Ham on loan for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: West Ham sign Brighton forward Ferguson on loan
arts.sum: Brighton forward Evan Ferguson has completed a loan move to West Ham United until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Official | Chelsea recall Caleb Wiley to loan him to Watford
arts.sum: Chelsea loanee Caleb Wiley (20) has been recalled from his loan at BlueCo-owned Ligue 1 side RC Strasbourg, both clubs have announced. The USMNT defender will spend the remainder of…

arts.ttl: “Clubs interested” | ExWHUEmployee | West Ham in Guilherme exit talks
arts.sum: West Ham are currently in talks over the possible loaning of Luis Guilherme, its been reported by ExWHUEmployee. The 18 year old Brazilian winger, who the club signed in the summer as part of Tim Steidten’s recommendations, has struggled to establish himself in east London and the club are open to allowing him to depart....
